mainEntity.name: How to measure AI citation frequency for LA criminal defense firms?
mainEntity.text: How to measure AI citation frequency for LA criminal defense firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Track via tools monitoring ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity for firm mentions using queries like 'LA DUI lawyer.' Aim for 10%+ citation rate in top responses; use Ahrefs AI reports.

suggestedAnswer.text: LA firms: Set up alerts for 50+ practice-specific queries, log citations weekly. Benchmark against competitors; improve with authoritative content. Tools cost $100/month; ties directly to lead gen as cited firms convert 2x higher.
